data.title: Roblox Shareholders Back Leadership, Pay, and Auditor Choices
data.description:
Memorial Day Sale – Claim 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock trusted, data-backed investing tools with TipRanks Premium, from analyst ratings and forecasts to breaking news and portfolio analysis.
  • Discover high-conviction stock picks and new investing opportunities with the TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter

Roblox ( (RBLX) ) has issued an announcement.

At its May 28, 2026 annual meeting of stockholders, Roblox reported that 92.6% of the voting power was represented, with Class A shares carrying one vote and Class B shares 20 votes each, underscoring the company’s dual-class share structure and concentrated voting control. Shareholders elected David Baszucki, Gregory Baszucki, and Dennis Durkin to the board for terms running until the 2029 annual meeting, approved on an advisory basis the compensation of named executive officers, and ratified Deloitte & Touche LLP as independent auditor for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2026, signaling broad investor support for current leadership, pay practices, and financial oversight.

The most recent analyst rating on (RBLX) stock is a Buy with a $70.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Roblox stock, see the RBLX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RBLX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RBLX is a Neutral.

The score is primarily supported by strong cash generation and high gross margins, but is held back by ongoing operating/net losses and weakening technical trend signals. Near-term outlook risk increased after lowered full-year guidance tied to safety/age-check and discovery changes, while the new buyback provides a modest offset.

To see Spark’s full report on RBLX stock, click here.

More about Roblox

Roblox Corporation operates in the interactive entertainment and online gaming industry, providing a user-generated content platform where players can create, share, and monetize immersive 3D experiences. The company’s primary services center on its Roblox platform, which targets a global audience of gamers, developers, and creators, with a business model tied to virtual currency and in-experience purchases.

Average Trading Volume: 10,701,216

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $32.67B

Triumph Financial ( (TFIN) ) has issued an announcement.

On May 29, 2026, Triumph Financial, Inc. announced that its board of directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $17.81 per share on its 7.125% Series C Fixed-Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, equivalent to $0.44525 per depositary share representing a 1/40 interest in a preferred share. The dividend will be paid on June 30, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on June 15, 2026, underscoring the company’s ongoing capital return to preferred investors and providing income visibility for holders of its listed preferred depositary shares.

The most recent analyst rating on (TFIN) stock is a Hold with a $70.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Triumph Financial stock, see the TFIN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TFIN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TFIN is a Neutral.

The score is driven by improving operating momentum and constructive earnings-call guidance, supported by a strong technical setup (price above key moving averages, positive MACD). These positives are tempered by weaker financial fundamentals versus prior peaks (sharp TTM revenue decline and low ROE) and a stretched valuation (P/E ~55.8 with no dividend yield provided).

To see Spark’s full report on TFIN stock, click here.

More about Triumph Financial

Triumph Financial, Inc. is a transportation-focused financial and technology company that delivers payments, factoring, banking, and intelligence solutions tailored to freight brokers, carriers, shippers, and factors. The Dallas-based group, whose portfolio includes Triumph, LoadPay and TBK Bank, develops products to streamline freight transactions, boost transparency and security, and expand working-capital access across the transportation sector.

data.title: Upay Delays Annual Filing Amid Auditor Review
data.description:
Upay ( (UPYY) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Memorial Day Sale – Claim 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock trusted, data-backed investing tools with TipRanks Premium, from analyst ratings and forecasts to breaking news and portfolio analysis.
  • Discover high-conviction stock picks and new investing opportunities with the TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter

Upay, Inc. has filed a Form 12b-25 to notify investors of a delayed Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the financial period ended February 28, 2026, along with a related Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) that remains under review. The company emphasizes that the delayed filing concerns completion of financial reporting for the most recent fiscal year.

The primary reason for the delay is that Upay’s independent auditor has not yet finished reviewing the company’s financial statements and the Form 10-Q (Quarter Report). Management states that filing on time would have required unreasonable effort and expense while this audit work is still in progress.

Upay indicates that it expects to file the missing Form 10-K (Yearly Report) within the 15-day extension window allowed under SEC rules for such notifications. The company also notes that quarterly reports such as the Form 10-Q (Quarter Report), when delayed, are generally required to be filed within five days of the original deadline.

On the financial side, Upay does not anticipate a significant change in overall results of operations compared with the same period last year, although it does flag one notable shift. The company expects its financial statements to show an $86,835 decline in revenue, from $257,249 for the three months ended May 31, 2024 to $170,414 for the three months ended May 31, 2025, driven mainly by weaker transactional revenue in its South African operations.

These revenue figures are preliminary and reflect management’s current expectations, meaning actual reported results may differ once the audit review is completed and the Form 10-K (Yearly Report) and related Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) are filed. Investors should treat this information as forward-looking and subject to change as final numbers are prepared.

Upay affirms that all other required periodic SEC reports over the past 12 months have been filed, underlining its intention to remain in compliance despite the current delay. The notification is signed on behalf of the company by Chief Executive Officer and Chief Financial Officer Jaco Folscher, dated May 29, 2026, signaling executive-level oversight of the late-filing process.

More about Upay

Average Trading Volume: 1,000

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $15.75M

For an in-depth examination of UPYY stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

The latest update is out from Otello Corporation ASA ( (GB:0FI5) ).

Otello Corporation ASA is a Norway-based technology company that develops and licenses software and digital services, with a focus on internet and mobile platforms. The company uses share repurchase programs as an active capital management tool to adjust its treasury share position and optimize its balance sheet.

Otello reported that Pareto Securities bought 70,100 shares on its behalf between 26 and 29 May 2026 at an average price of NOK 18.26, bringing total purchases in the ongoing buyback program to 1,468,936 shares. The program allows purchases of up to 3,689,541 shares at a maximum price of NOK 20, and Otello now holds 5,158,477 treasury shares under an authorization from the September 2025 extraordinary general meeting.

data.title: Exxon Mobil Shareholders Back Board, Approve Texas Redomiciling
data.description:
Memorial Day Sale – Claim 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock trusted, data-backed investing tools with TipRanks Premium, from analyst ratings and forecasts to breaking news and portfolio analysis.
  • Discover high-conviction stock picks and new investing opportunities with the TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter

Exxon Mobil ( (XOM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Exxon Mobil held its Annual Meeting of Shareholders on May 27, 2026, with 87.8% of eligible shares represented, and shareholders elected all 12 board-nominated directors with strong majorities, generally above 96% of votes cast. Investors also overwhelmingly ratified the company’s independent auditors and approved executive compensation, signaling continued confidence in current leadership and governance practices.

Shareholders approved the company’s proposal to redomicile from New Jersey to Texas with 71.2% support, a move that could have long-term implications for its corporate governance and regulatory environment. Investor attempts to secure an independent board chair and to alter Exxon Mobil’s voluntary retail voting program were decisively rejected, underscoring broad backing for the existing board structure and management-aligned voting framework.

The most recent analyst rating on (XOM) stock is a Hold with a $175.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Exxon Mobil stock, see the XOM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on XOM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, XOM is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by solid fundamentals anchored by a conservative balance sheet and still-healthy profitability, tempered by weaker free-cash-flow conversion versus prior years. Technicals are mixed with subdued momentum, and valuation is a headwind given the elevated P/E despite a moderate dividend yield. Earnings-call execution progress supports the outlook, but notable geopolitical/LNG repair and chemicals margin risks cap the score.

To see Spark’s full report on XOM stock, click here.

More about Exxon Mobil

Exxon Mobil Corporation is a global integrated oil and gas company engaged in the exploration, production, refining and marketing of petroleum and petrochemical products. The company operates across the energy value chain and is one of the largest publicly traded energy providers, supplying fuels, lubricants and chemical products to industrial, commercial and consumer markets worldwide.

Average Trading Volume: 20,883,250

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $613B

data.description:

An announcement from Infosys ( (INFY) ) is now available.

Infosys disclosed that on May 29, 2026, it filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission to furnish a stock exchange intimation concerning its 45th Annual General Meeting and the company’s Integrated Annual Report for the 2025-26 financial year. The filing is largely procedural, signaling the formal availability of AGM materials and the integrated report to U.S. investors and reinforcing the company’s compliance and governance disclosures for international shareholders.

The notice, signed by Company Secretary A.G.S. Manikantha on May 29, 2026, confirms that the AGM documentation has been disseminated to stock exchanges and attached as an exhibit to the SEC submission. For stakeholders, the move ensures transparent access to Infosys’s latest integrated reporting package and aligns the firm’s U.S. regulatory communications with its Indian market disclosure obligations ahead of the upcoming shareholder meeting.

The most recent analyst rating on (INFY) stock is a Hold with a $13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Infosys stock, see the INFY Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, INFY is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial quality (low leverage, solid profitability and cash generation) and a supportive valuation (moderate P/E and high dividend yield). These positives are tempered by weak technicals (downtrend across key moving averages with negative momentum) and a conservative FY27 outlook that flags competitive and AI-related pricing pressures.

data.title: Kier Advances Share Buyback, Updates Market on Voting Rights
data.description:
Memorial Day Sale – Claim 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock trusted, data-backed investing tools with TipRanks Premium, from analyst ratings and forecasts to breaking news and portfolio analysis.
  • Discover high-conviction stock picks and new investing opportunities with the TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from Kier Group plc ( (GB:KIE) ).

Kier Group plc has continued executing its share buyback programme, repurchasing 200,000 ordinary 1p shares between 26 and 29 May 2026 through Deutsche Numis at volume-weighted average prices around 205–208 pence per share. The company intends to hold these shares in treasury, reflecting capital management aimed at optimising its share structure and potentially enhancing earnings per share.

Since the buyback’s launch in March 2026, Kier has acquired a total of 2,950,000 shares, bringing the number of ordinary shares in issue to 452,875,390, of which 13,928,468 are held in treasury. The update also confirms that the total voting rights now stand at 438,946,922, providing a new reference point for shareholders monitoring their disclosure thresholds under U.K. transparency rules.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:KIE) stock is a Hold with a £215.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kier Group plc stock, see the GB:KIE Stock Forecast page.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial performance (especially cash flow strength) and a constructive earnings update with strong order-book visibility and improving cash position. data.title: ProVen Growth and Income VCT Expands Share Capital With New Admissions to LSE
data.description:
Memorial Day Sale – Claim 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock trusted, data-backed investing tools with TipRanks Premium, from analyst ratings and forecasts to breaking news and portfolio analysis.
  • Discover high-conviction stock picks and new investing opportunities with the TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter

Proven Growth and Income VCT ( (GB:PGOO) ) has shared an announcement.

ProVen Growth and Income VCT plc has admitted further tranches of ordinary shares to trading on the London Stock Exchange’s Main Market, following recent equity issues under its joint offer for subscription with ProVen VCT plc. New admissions totalled over 7.5 million ordinary shares across March, April and May 2026, fully fungible with existing stock and lifting the company’s total shares in issue to 335,180,416.

The staged admissions, made under a prospectus first published in November 2025, expand the VCT’s capital base and reflect ongoing investor demand for its shares. The enlarged equity pool should give the trust additional firepower for new and follow-on investments in its portfolio companies, while marginally diluting existing holdings but potentially supporting liquidity in the secondary market.

More about Proven Growth and Income VCT

ProVen Growth and Income VCT plc is a UK-listed venture capital trust investing primarily in growth-stage unquoted and AIM-quoted companies. The trust focuses on providing investors with a combination of income and capital growth by backing smaller, high-potential businesses under the UK’s VCT tax-efficient investment framework.

Average Trading Volume: 5,251

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy
